channel.title: Relativity on Compossible
channel.description: Recent content in Relativity on Compossible

item.title: Towards a universal ethical framework
item.description:
Table of contents

  1. AI Podcast Version
  2. Introduction
  3. Towards an invariant foundation of ethics for life
  4. Compossibility is key
  5. Building axioms, laws and principles
  6. Direct decentralised democracy
  7. The Consensus Engine and DAO
  8. Modern democracies are largely symbolic

AI Podcast Version

I have created an AI podcast version with additional information from my article ‘Direct Decentralised Democracy’:

Introduction

“ At this stage of history … either the general population will take control of its own destiny and will concern itself with community-interests, guided by values of solidarity and sympathy and concern for others; or … there will be no destiny for anyone to control. ”[1]
